svg.text: All question-scoped light graphs are composed into one publication-style canvas.

8cf51dda | I'm going back to our previous conversation about the grant aim page on molecular subtypes and endometrial cancer. Can you remind me what were the three objectives we outlined for the project?
8cf51dda | the project | objective | validate the identified subtypes using an independent cohort of endometrial cancer samples
8cf51dda | the project | objective | identify molecular subtypes of endometrial cancer using a combination of genomic and transcriptomic approaches
8cf51dda | the project | objective | investigate their clinical and biological significance using a combination of functional and bioinformatic approaches
06f04340 | What should I serve for dinner this weekend with my homegrown ingredients?
06f04340 | Basil, mint, and cherry tomatoes | combination | match made in heaven
06f04340 | sauce | serve | grilled meats or as a dip

06f04340 | dinner this weekend with my homegrown ingredients | supported_reason | Use it as a dip for snacks or as a sauce for grilled meats or vegetables; (assistant) I'm trying to find some new recipe ideas that use fresh basil and mint

06f04340 | dinner this weekend with my homegrown ingredients | preferred_direction | sauce to serve with grilled meats or as a dip; end basil with garlic, pine nuts, Parmesan, and olive oil to create a vibrant pesto sauce; Basil, mint, and cherry tomatoes combination match made in heaven. Grounding: Use it as a dip for snacks or as a sauce for grilled meats or vegetables; (assistant) I'm trying to find some new recipe ideas that use fresh basil and mint

54026fce | I've been thinking about ways to stay connected with my colleagues. Any suggestions?

54026fce | ways to stay connected with my colleagues | preferred_direction | feedback gathering; compatibility with devices and browsers; introducing a new idea essential frame it in a way that encourages collaboration and buy-in from your team. Grounding: (assistant) When introducing a new idea, it's essential to frame it in a way that encourages collaboration and buy-in from your team; Regularly gather feedback from team members to understand what's working and what's not

8a2466db | Can you recommend some resources where I can learn more about video editing?
8a2466db | Premiere Pro's audio advanced settings | allow | precise control over audio mixing

8a2466db | video editing | supported_reason | (assistant) To dive deeper into these topics, I recommend the following resources; (assistant) I'm trying to learn more about some advanced settings for video editing with Adobe Premiere Pro, which I enjoy to use
8a2466db | Adobe Premiere Pro | is | powerful video editing software

8a2466db | video editing | preferred_direction | YouTube channels like Premiere Bro, Video Copilot, and Adobe Creative Cloud; Adobe Premiere Pro's official documentation and tutorials; powerful video editing software. Grounding: (assistant) To dive deeper into these topics, I recommend the following resources; (assistant) I'm trying to learn more about some advanced settings for video editing with Adobe Premiere Pro, which I enjoy to use
